chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 980 of 2021 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.4215/2021 2. For hearing of main case 30.04.2025 Mr. Abbas Leghari, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ghulam Asghar Pathan, advocate for respondent This petition is pending since 2021. Per learned counsel the controversy is encapsulated per impugned letter dated 15.12.2020, available at page 75 herein. It is the petitioner’s case that the same was unwarranted as all outstanding dues were already paid. The notice suggests to the contrary and provided a forum of opportunity to the petitioners to state their case. Learned counsel for the respondent department states that it may be just and proper for the notice to be adjudicated by the respondent authority after providing an opportunity of hearing to the petitioner. He further states that pending the aforesaid no further coercive action be taken against the petitioners. Learned counsel for the petitioner has no cavil to the petition being disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
